subject: You have a new alert!
alertDescription:
The VPN remote gateway 12.207.114.35 has been lost

NOTE 20220812 - If the lost VPN gateway IP is 71.26.198.53 or 71.26.196.61, Bruce Fay has confirmed these sites will be shut down nightly for the next month at a minimum. Please auto-close lost gateway tickerts from these locations until further notice.
Begin Crisis Management
Warm Hand-off to IS - Networking team

subject: You have a new alert!
companyName: Ambient Enterprises DMG San Luis Obispo
alertDescription:
This network element has gone offline   Cisco WS-C2960XR-48FPD-I

SD Tasks
VPN into client/Log into Meraki portal depending on device
Connect to nearest connected device (IE, if it's a server out, connect to connected switch to validate interface status)
If it's up: problem with Auvik: Open support ticket with Auvik via Support option in lower right
If down, verify ISP is showing site as up. 
If ISP shows down, begin crisis management, Validate power on device with client
If power is good, warm handoff to IS - Networking team
If you cannot contact the client, hold off on warm handoff until Power can be verified.
